loop1.title: UPS Capacity
loop1.note: Showing active power load vs rated capacity (kVA/kW) and current load — bypass readiness score is not measured by this UPS output meter.

loop1.title: UPS Load
loop1.note: Showing active power load and load factor — headroom is derived from rated capacity; narrative insight is not available.

loop1.title: Output Load & Capacity — Composite
loop1.note: Showing output load (load factor) and bypass frequency; bypass voltage is proxied by nominal voltage as it is not directly measured.
